---
description: Review or update the frontend migration template, then create a scope-specific frontend migration plan
agent: migration.mvc-kendo-migrator
---

Review `/Tasks/frontend-migration-template.md`.

If the template does not exist, create it.
If it exists, validate whether it is sufficient for the current migration needs and update it only when necessary.

Then create a scope-specific frontend migration plan for the selected migration scope.

The plan should be precise down to Razor migration categories, bundling replacement patterns, unsupported syntax replacement, namespace updates, and Kendo-related migration tasks.
